scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "sh -c 'BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-4000} npm --prefix backend run start'" "sh -c 'BACKEND_URL=${BACKEND_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:${BACKEND_PORT:-4000}} npm --prefix frontend run start'"
